codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly adds a 'Research & Optimization History' section to README.md with a proper link to RESEARCH.md and accurate performance summary (51.72 tok/s). The section placement is logical (after Performance section, before Hardware Requirements) and all existing content was preserved.

summary: Feature passed review. The implementation correctly fulfills all requirements: (1) adds Research & Optimization History section, (2) links to RESEARCH.md with correct markdown syntax, (3) includes accurate performance summary (51.72 tok/s, 3.38× improvement), and (4) preserves all existing README content. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
